bank.bankConfigurationDescription: Manage bank settings, profile, and operations.
bank.webhooksDescription: Manage webhook endpoints to receive event notifications from this memory bank.
bank.auditLogsDescription: View audit trail of all operations performed on this memory bank.
bank.recallAnalyzerDescription: Analyze memory recall with detailed trace information and retrieval methods.
bank.reflectDescription: Run an agentic loop that autonomously gathers evidence and reasons through the lens of the bank's disposition to generate contextual responses.
bank.memoriesDescription: View and explore different types of memories stored in this memory bank.
bank.worldFactsDescription: Objective facts about the world received from external sources.
bank.experienceDescription: The bank's own actions, interactions, and first-person experiences.
bank.observationsDescription: Consolidated knowledge synthesized from facts — patterns, preferences, and learnings that emerge from accumulated evidence.
bank.mentalModelsDescription: User-curated summaries generated from queries — reusable knowledge snapshots that can be refreshed as memories evolve.
bank.documentsDescription: Manage documents and retain new memories.
bank.entitiesDescription: Explore entities (people, organizations, places) mentioned in memories.
bank.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you absolutely sure you want to delete {bankName}?
bank.resetConfigConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all configuration overrides for {bankName}?
bank.resetConfigWarning: All per-bank settings (retain, observations, reflect) will revert to organization or server defaults. This does not affect memories, entities, or the bank profile.
bank.clearObservationsConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all observations for {bankName}?
bank.clearObservationsWarning: This will delete all consolidated knowledge. Observations will be regenerated the next time consolidation runs.
bank.recoveredMemories: Recovered {count} failed {count, plural, one {memory} other {memories}} for re-consolidation
bank.overviewAndOperations: Overview statistics and background operations for this memory bank.
bank.deleteBankPrompt: Are you sure you want to delete the memory bank <bankName></bankName>?
bank.deleteBankWarning: This action cannot be undone. All memories, entities, documents, and the bank profile will be permanently deleted.
bank.resetConfigPrompt: Are you sure you want to reset configuration for <bankName></bankName>?
bank.resetConfigDetailedWarning: All retain, observation, and reflect configuration overrides will be cleared. This action cannot be undone.
bank.clearObservationsPrompt: Are you sure you want to clear all observations for <bankName></bankName>?
bank.clearObservationsDetailedWarning: All observation memories will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
bank.observationsDisabledMessage: Observations consolidation is disabled on this server. Set <envVar></envVar> to enable.
bank.deleteWillDeleteDetails: This will delete {memories, plural, one {# memory} other {# memories}}, {documents, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}}, and {links, plural, one {# link} other {# links}}.
bank.deleteWillDeleteObservations: This will delete {count, plural, one {# observation} other {# observations}}.

bankProfile.noBankSelectedDescription: Please select a memory bank from the dropdown above to view its profile.
bankProfile.dispositionProfileDescription: Traits that shape how opinions are formed via Reflect
bankProfile.missionDescription: Who the agent is and what they're trying to accomplish. Used for mental models and reflect.
bankProfile.noMissionSet: No mission set. Set a mission to derive structural mental models and personalize reflect responses.
bankProfile.directivesDescription: Hard rules that must be followed during reflect
bankProfile.noDirectivesMessage: No directives yet. Directives are hard rules that must be followed during reflect.
bankProfile.deleteDirectiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
bankProfile.editDispositionDescription: Traits that shape the reasoning and perspective
bankProfile.editMissionDescription: Affects how observations, reflect, and mental models are created
bankProfile.missionPlaceholder: e.g., I am a PM for the engineering team. I help coordinate sprints and track project progress...
bankProfile.directiveFormDescription: Directives are hard rules that must be followed during reflect.
bankProfile.directiveRulePlaceholder: e.g., Never mention competitor products directly.
bankProfile.skepticismDescription: How skeptical vs trusting when forming opinions
bankProfile.literalismDescription: How literally to interpret information when forming opinions
bankProfile.empathyDescription: How much to consider emotional context when forming opinions

bankStats.noMemoriesIngestedInPeriod: No memories ingested in this period

bankConfig.apiDisabledTitle: Bank configuration API is not enabled
bankConfig.apiDisabledDescription: Set HINDSIGHT_API_ENABLE_BANK_CONFIG_API=true on the server to enable per-bank configuration.
bankConfig.noToolsWarning: Warning: no tools selected — agents will be blocked from all MCP calls for this bank.
bankConfig.retainDescription: Control what gets extracted and stored from content
bankConfig.chunkSizeDescription: Size of text chunks for processing (characters)
bankConfig.retainMissionDescription: What this bank should pay attention to during extraction. Steers the LLM without replacing the extraction rules — works alongside any extraction mode.
bankConfig.retainMissionPlaceholder: e.g. Always include technical decisions, API design choices, and architectural trade-offs. Ignore meeting logistics, greetings, and social exchanges.
bankConfig.extractionModeDescription: How aggressively to extract facts: concise (default, selective), verbose (capture everything), custom (write your own extraction rules)
bankConfig.customExtractionPromptDescription: Replaces the built-in extraction rules entirely. Only active when Extraction Mode is set to custom.
bankConfig.entitiesDescription: Control entity extraction and define a controlled vocabulary of key:value classification labels (e.g. pedagogy:scaffolding, interest:active)
bankConfig.entityLabelsFailedToSave: Failed to save entity labels settings
bankConfig.freeFormEntitiesDescription: Extract regular named entities (people, places, concepts) alongside label groups. Disable to restrict extraction to label groups only.
bankConfig.observationsDescription: Control how facts are synthesized into durable observations
bankConfig.enableObservationsDescription: Enable automatic consolidation of facts into observations
bankConfig.observationsMissionDescription: What this bank should synthesise into durable observations. Replaces the built-in consolidation rules — leave blank to use the server default.
bankConfig.observationsMissionPlaceholder: e.g. Observations are stable facts about people and projects. Always include preferences, skills, and recurring patterns. Ignore one-off events and ephemeral state.
bankConfig.reflectDescription: Shape how the bank reasons and responds in reflect operations
bankConfig.reflectMissionDescription: Agent identity and purpose. Used as framing context in reflect.
bankConfig.reflectMissionPlaceholder: e.g. You are a senior engineering assistant. Always ground answers in documented decisions and rationale. Ignore speculation. Be direct and precise.
bankConfig.skepticismDescription: How skeptical vs trusting when evaluating claims
bankConfig.empathyDescription: How much to weight emotional context
bankConfig.mcpToolsDescription: Restrict which MCP tools this bank exposes to agents
bankConfig.restrictToolsDescription: When off, all tools are available. When on, only the selected tools can be invoked for this bank.
bankConfig.safetySettingsDescriptionPart1: When off, Gemini’s default safety thresholds are used. When on, configure thresholds per harm category.
bankConfig.geminiSafetyEditorDescriptionPart1: Set the blocking threshold for each harm category. “Off” disables the filter entirely (default for Gemini 2.5+). Lower thresholds block more content.
bankConfig.retainSectionDescription: Default extraction settings and named strategies. Pass a strategy name on retain requests to override defaults per-item.
bankConfig.defaultStrategyDescription: Applied automatically when no strategy is specified on a request.
bankConfig.llmBatchSizeDescription: Number of facts sent to the LLM in a single consolidation call. Higher values reduce LLM calls at the cost of larger prompts. Leave blank to use the server default.
bankConfig.sourceFactsMaxTokensDescription: Maximum tokens of source facts passed to the consolidation prompt. Higher values include more context but cost more per call. Leave blank to use the server default.
bankConfig.sourceFactsMaxTokensPerObservationLabel: Source Facts Max Tokens Per Observation
bankConfig.sourceFactsMaxTokensPerObservationDescri: Maximum tokens of source facts considered when generating a single observation. Leave blank to use the server default.
bankConfig.maxObservationsPerScopeDescription: Cap on the number of observations stored per scope after consolidation. Leave blank to use the server default.
bankConfig.deleteStrategyDescription: This will remove the strategy and all its overrides. This cannot be undone.
bankConfig.extractorHintWhichPlaceholder: extractor hint: when to pick this value

bankOperations.title: Background Operations
bankOperations.rawPayloadHelp: Shows the full parameters the operation was submitted with (may be large).

dataView.noMemoriesDescription: Add a document to start building this memory bank.
dataView.filterByTextPlaceholder: Filter by text or context (press Enter)...
dataView.constellationViewDescription: Canvas-rendered memory map with spatial label deconfliction. Scroll to zoom, drag to pan, hover to explore entity connections. Click a memory to view details.
dataView.allLinksVisible: All links between visible nodes are shown.
dataView.limitedTo50Nodes: ⚠️ Limited to 50 nodes for performance. Total: {count}
dataView.clickNodeForDetails: Click a node to see details
dataView.memoriesWithoutDatesInTable: {count} memories without dates in Table View.

documentsView.searchPlaceholder: Search documents (ID)... Press Enter to search
documentsView.saveHint: Saving will re-ingest this document via retain (upsert). Existing memory units for this document will be replaced.
documentsView.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete document
documentsView.toastDocumentUpdatedDescription: Memory units for this document have been re-extracted.
documentsView.noChunksFound: No chunks found for this document
documentsView.clickChunksTabToLoad: Click the Chunks tab to load chunks

entitiesView.noCooccurrencesDescription: Two entities co-occur when they appear in the same memory.
entitiesView.noEntitiesDescription: Entities are extracted from facts when memories are added.
entitiesView.noObservations: No observations yet. Observations are generated automatically during consolidation.

mentalModels.selectBankPrompt: Select a memory bank to view mental models.
mentalModels.filterPlaceholder: Filter mental models by name, query, or content...
mentalModels.emptyFilterMatch: No mental models match your filter
mentalModels.emptyNoModels: No mental models yet. Create a mental model to generate and save a summary from your memories.
mentalModels.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
mentalModels.createDialogDescription: Create a mental model by running a query. The content will be auto-generated and can be refreshed later.
mentalModels.updateDialogDescription: Update the mental model configuration. Changes will take effect immediately.
mentalModels.fieldSourceQueryPlaceholder: e.g., How does the team prefer to communicate?
mentalModels.toastCreatedDescription: Content is being generated in the background
mentalModels.invalidTagGroupsJson: Invalid JSON in Tag Groups field
mentalModels.optionsRefreshModeFull: Full — regenerate from scratch each refresh
mentalModels.optionsRefreshModeDelta: Delta — surgical edits, preserve unchanged content
mentalModels.optionsRefreshModeDeltaDescription: Delta mode applies minimal changes to the existing content. Falls back to a full rewrite on the first refresh and whenever the source query changes.
mentalModels.optionsTagsDescription: Tags scope the model during reflect and filter source memories during refresh (default all_strict: only memories carrying every listed tag are read). If no memories have these tags yet, refresh will produce empty content — backfill tags on memories, or adjust Tags Match / Tag Groups below.
mentalModels.optionsTagsMatchDescription: Controls how the model's tags filter memories during refresh.
mentalModels.optionsTagGroupsDescription: Compound boolean tag expressions for refresh filtering. Overrides flat tags when set.
mentalModels.optionsRecallDescription: Override how the internal recall behaves when this model refreshes. Leave blank to inherit the bank/global default.
mentalModels.optionsFactTypesEmpty: Leave empty to include all types.
mentalModels.optionsRecallMaxTokensDescription: Token budget for facts returned by recall.
mentalModels.optionsRecallChunksMaxTokensDescription: Token budget for raw chunk text returned by recall.
mentalModels.count: {count, plural, one {# mental model} other {# mental models}}
mentalModels.clearDialogReSynth: The next refresh will re-synthesize content from scratch.
mentalModels.emptyContent: No content yet. Refresh this mental model to generate content.
mentalModels.selectModelPrompt: Select a mental model to view its content.

thinkView.noBankSelectedDescription: Select a memory bank to start reflecting.
thinkView.queryPlaceholder: What would you like to reflect on?
thinkView.newOpinionsDescription: New beliefs generated from this interaction
thinkView.addDirectiveDescription: Hard rules injected into prompts that the agent must follow
thinkView.directivePlaceholder: e.g., Always respond in formal English...
thinkView.observationsCreatedDescription: New observations learned during this reflection
thinkView.noOperationsDescription: No LLM or tool calls were made during this reflection.
thinkView.noFactsFoundDescription: No memories were used to generate this answer.
thinkView.readyToReflectDescription: Enter a question above to query the memory bank and generate a disposition-aware response.

searchDebug.noBankSelectedDescription: Select a memory bank to start recalling.
searchDebug.queryPlaceholder: What would you like to recall?
searchDebug.noMemoriesFound: No memories found for this query.
searchDebug.rrfDescription: Reciprocal Rank Fusion of all retrieval results
searchDebug.finalResultsDescription: Top results after all processing steps
searchDebug.readyToRecallDescription: Enter a query above to search through your memories. Use filters to narrow down by fact type, budget, and more.
searchDebug.errorSelectBank: Please select a memory bank first
searchDebug.errorSelectFactType: Please select at least one fact type
searchDebug.tooltipTemporal: Temporal proximity boost (±10% — only active for temporal queries)
searchDebug.tooltipRecency: Recency boost (±10% — based on memory age)

webhooksView.title: Webhooks
webhooksView.emptyStateCanManage: No webhooks configured. Add a webhook to receive event notifications.
webhooksView.emptyStateMember: No webhooks configured. Ask an admin to add a webhook.
webhooksView.createDialogDescription: Configure a webhook endpoint to receive event notifications.
webhooksView.deleteDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this webhook? This action cannot be undone and all pending deliveries will be cancelled.
webhooksView.noDeliveries: No deliveries yet for this webhook.

entityLabelsEditor.labelGroupsDescription: Classification labels extracted at retain time. Leave empty to disable.
entityLabelsEditor.entityLabelsDescription: Extracted per memory at retain time. Every field is optional — only filled when clearly applicable.
entityLabelsEditor.alsoStoreAsTagTooltip: Also store extracted values as tags on the memory (not just entities)

failedConsolidations.title: Failed consolidations
failedConsolidations.description: Source memories whose consolidation permanently failed. Recovery resets the failed flag and queues a fresh consolidation run so the worker retries them.
failedConsolidations.recoverSuccess: Queued {count, plural, one {# memory} other {# memories}} for re-consolidation

documentChunkModal.documentDescription: View the original document text and metadata
documentChunkModal.chunkDescription: View the chunk text and metadata

mentalModelDetailModal.basedOnNotCaptured: Not captured for this version (recorded before reflect snapshots were tracked).
mentalModelDetailModal.staleTitle: New memories in this mental model's scope have been ingested since it was last refreshed
mentalModelDetailModal.inSyncTitle: No new memories in this mental model's scope since it was last refreshed
mentalModelDetailModal.noSourceData: No source data available. Click "Refresh" to regenerate with source tracking.
mentalModelDetailModal.refreshTimeoutDescription: Refresh is taking longer than expected. Check the operations list for status.

graph2d.controlsHint: Drag to pan • Scroll to zoom • Double-click node to focus • Click background to reset

constellation.instructions: Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan · Hover to explore · Click to select

metadata.title: Hindsight Cloud
metadata.description: Multi-tenant control plane for Hindsight semantic memory

addDocument.dialogSubtitle: Add a new document to memory bank:
addDocument.dropzoneInstruction: Click or drag files here to upload
addDocument.dropzoneSupportedTypes: PDF, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, images, and text files
addDocument.parserStandardDescription: Free — good for most documents (not images)
addDocument.parserEnhancedDescription: Additional charge — better quality for complex layouts, scanned documents, and images
addDocument.tagsHelpText: Comma-separated tags for filtering during recall/reflect.
addDocument.toastDocumentAddedDescription: The document has been added and memories are being extracted.
addDocument.toastFilesSkippedDescription: Only supported file types are allowed (PDF, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, images, and text files).
addDocument.toastImagesRequireIrisDescription: Switch to Enhanced extraction to upload: {names}
addDocument.clickToSelectFiles: Click to select files or drag and drop
addDocument.templateManifestHelp: Paste a template manifest JSON to pre-configure the bank with settings, mental models, and directives.
addDocument.fileUploadDisabledMessage: File upload is not enabled on this server.
addDocument.fileTagsHelp: Comma-separated — used to filter memories during recall/reflect
addDocument.strategyHelpText: Override the bank's default extraction strategy for this document.
addDocument.observationScopesEmpty: Add tags above to preview observation scopes
addDocument.entitiesHelpText: Comma-separated hints merged with auto-extracted entities

dashboard.selectBank: Select a memory bank from the dropdown above to get started.
dashboard.sidebarHint: The sidebar will appear once you select a memory bank.

login.title: Hindsight Control Plane
login.description: Enter your access key to continue
